title: Creamy Italian Risotto with Roasted Daikon
description: A creamy risotto dish infused with Italian seasonings and paired with a simple roasted daikon.
instructions: Roast the daikon in the oven at 400°F (200°C) for 20 minutes.
Heat the chicken broth in a separate pot.
In a large skillet, sauté the garlic and olive oil over medium heat.
Add the risotto and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the warm chicken broth to the risotto, one cup at a time, stirring continuously.
After 20 minutes of cooking, stir in the parmesan cheese and italian seasoning.
Serve the risotto with roasted daikon on top.
